compiled_state.title: sprint-next-batch.sh: closed ticket deps default to 'open' in status map
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: In sprint-next-batch.sh, ticket_status_map.get(target_id, 'open') uses 'open' as the default for tickets not in the map. Closed tickets are excluded from the map, so deps on closed tickets appear 'open' and may block tasks from being considered ready. Discovered 2026-04-11 during epic 81b4-c50c sprint execution. Reference: ticket 401c-4a1a (created this session).
